# INPersonSuggestionType.instantMessageAddress

**Case**

An instant messaging address.

## Declaration

```swift
case instantMessageAddress
```

## Discussion

When specified, interactions become populated with the person’s instant message address instead of their actual name.

## Constants

- **INPersonSuggestionType.none**: No contact information to donate.
- **INPersonSuggestionType.socialProfile**: A social media account.
title: INPersonSuggestionType.instantMessageAddress
